programs.title: Live: Erin Burnett OutFront
programs.desc: Erin Burnett stays ahead of the headlines, delivering a show that's in-depth and informative with compelling interviews, lively debates and analysis of situations.

programs.title: Live: Anderson Cooper 360
programs.desc: Anderson Cooper goes beyond the headlines with in-depth reporting and investigations; Anderson keeps his commitment to holding those in power accountable; joining him are guests that frequently include political and legal analysts.

programs.title: Live: The Source With Kaitlan Collins
programs.desc: Kaitlan Collins is chasing the facts, asking the tough questions and connecting with her sources.

programs.title: Live: CNN NewsNight With Abby Phillip
programs.desc: Abby Phillip leads a roundtable discussion on the day's biggest stories and issues shaping our world.

programs.title: Laura Coates Live
programs.desc: Laura Coates sparks unique conversations and covers the most interesting stories of the day through a news, legal and pop culture lens.

programs.title: Live: The Story Is With Elex Michaelson
programs.desc: Elex Michaelson tackles the breaking stories making headlines with sharp analysis, fresh perspective and a dose of humor.
